episodes.title: Frontier AI Lab Competition — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) retakes the coding frontier and resets mid-tier pricing; Anthropic moves Fable 5 to metered pricing after its June outage; Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro slips to July 17 in a full rebuild. The bigger shift: US government pre-clearance of frontier launches.

episodes.title: Capital Markets Cross-Asset Radar — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Cross-asset read into the June FOMC minutes: the curve isn't priced for the nine-official hike scenario, while an 8,000 S&P and a hawkish Fed tell two different stories. Q2 earnings and the AI capex trade are the referee.

episodes.title: Digital Money, Crypto, and Market Structure — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Bitcoin (~$61.9K) is trading as a leveraged rates bet, not a crypto story. ETF flows bounced July 2 after $4.1B of June outflows, but the real signal is stablecoin supply falling to $312B — its worst month since TerraUSD.

episodes.title: Strategic Power, Energy, and Institutional Change — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: The AI race is now an electricity race: US data-center demand heads from 31 to 66 GW by 2027, hyperscalers build on-site gas to skip the grid, and the nuclear wave (9.8 GW signed) is a late-decade hedge. The binding constraint is the permit, not the chip.
